"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None:\\n        total_steps = max(1, TRAIN_MAX_STEPS)\\n    else:\\n        total_steps = max(1, steps_per_epoch * 100)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\\n\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Under fixed-step evaluation (256 steps), a cosine schedule tied directly to TRAIN_MAX_STEPS should allocate learning rate across the actual budget instead of an overlong horizon, improving within-budget convergence with minimal complexity.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\"]}"}}
